findings.title: Closeout status correctly gated at implemented
findings.summary: Claude noted S09 was still in the expected mid-closeout implemented state before this review, with claude-review-result, adjudication, and construction-inspection pending. This is procedural gating, not an implementation defect.

findings.title: blocked_claim_refs pattern admits dot separators
findings.summary: Claude noted blocked_claim_refs use the inherited S07 pattern with dot or underscore separators, while ownership correction_route is underscore-only. The fields serve different purposes and this is non-blocking.

scope_reviewed: required field registry completed in RP00.P01.M03.S08
raw_result_excerpt: overall_verdict: PASS; No P0/P1/P2 findings; Blocks subphase closeout: NO; two P3_NOTE findings only.
